sources.reason: wrapper-library-mcp-subprocess: stickerdaniel/linkedin-mcp-server is the chosen implementation; endpoints are scraped by Patchright internally and not exposed as a spec

user chose browser-session cookie auth over Bearer API key; sniff happenstance.ai web app to discover cookie-authenticated endpoints (developer.happenstance.ai/openapi.json gives endpoint shape but not the cookie-auth surface)
docs-based generation chosen; code.deepline.com/docs is the canonical source and /api/v2/integrations/{toolId}/execute is a stable pattern
